Siege Saboteur Chest
Emerald Infiltrator Crossbow

When attacking, has a [30%-33%] chance of dealing [145%-165%] damage in 2 seconds.
Once every 3 sec., the crossbow owner reduces the maximum health, physical and magical armor, and magic power of the attack target and 2 nearest enemy fighters by 10% for 4 sec. A maximum of 4 effects. Additionally, all affected fighters are stunned for 1 sec. and receive 243200 physical damage.

Requirements: 98-100
